components.name: Recaster Neural Relay
components.description:
Interprets signals from other mechanical organisms.

Source: Dismantled from Recaster servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Recaster in Orb Vallis pond hotspots during Cold weather. Also drops from resource containers across the Orb Vallis.

components.name: Star Amarast
components.description:
Polished and cut to perfection.

Blueprint sold by Smokefinger in Fortuna on Venus.

components.name: Star Crimzian
components.description:
Polished and cut to perfection.

Blueprint sold by Old Man Suumbaat in Cetus on Earth.

components.name: Synathid Ecosynth Analyzer
components.description:
A processing unit that efficiently monitors environmental data.

Source: Dismantled from Synathid servofish via The Business in Fortuna (Venus). Catch Synathid in Orb Vallis cave hotspots during any weather. Also drops from the Exploiter Orb in the Orb Vallis.

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Terminal Velocity Mod not applying projectile velocity changes to Sentinels using the Helstrum weapon.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.1.2 + Hotfix 29.1.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some Sentinel and Moa Weapon types not getting affected by Magazine related Mods (notably Helstrum).

patchlogs.name: The Deadlock Protocol: Hotfix 28.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Helstrum dealing self-damage to the Companion that it is equipped on.

patchlogs.name: The Deadlock Protocol: Hotfix 28.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Helstrum missing from the Codex and an inability to Chat link it.
